user.title: Add OBS Studio
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to an OBS Studio instance via WebSocket.

data.name: Name
data.ssh_host: SSH host (leave blank to use OBS host)
data.obs_remote_host: OBS host as seen from SSH server

data_description.host: Hostname or IP of the machine running OBS Studio.
data_description.ws_password: Password set in OBS → Tools → WebSocket Server Settings.
data_description.ssh_enabled: Forward the OBS WebSocket port over an SSH tunnel. Useful when OBS only listens on localhost.
data_description.ssh_host: SSH server hostname. Defaults to the OBS host when left blank.
data_description.ssh_key_path: Absolute path to the SSH private key file on this Home Assistant instance. Used when key content is not provided.
data_description.ssh_key_content: Paste the PEM-encoded private key directly. Takes precedence over the key path when provided.
data_description.ssh_known_hosts: Paste the known_hosts entry for the SSH server (e.g. from `ssh-keyscan`). Leave blank to skip host key verification.
data_description.obs_remote_host: Hostname/IP of OBS as seen from the SSH server. Usually `localhost`.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure OBS Studio
reconfigure.description: Update connection settings. Leave the password blank to keep the current value.

data.obs_remote_host: OBS host as seen from SSH server

reauth_confirm.title: Update OBS WebSocket password
reauth_confirm.description: OBS rejected the stored password for **{name}**. Enter the current WebSocket password.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to OBS WebSocket. Check the host, port, and that OBS is running.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the WebSocket password in OBS.
error.ssh_error: SSH tunnel could not be established. Check the SSH credentials and key path.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This OBS instance is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll OBS for state. Minimum 5 s.

set_scene.name: Set scene
set_scene.description: Switch to a specific scene in OBS Studio.

scene_name.name: Scene name
scene_name.description: Exact name of the scene to switch to.

save_replay_buffer.name: Save replay buffer
save_replay_buffer.description: Save the current OBS replay buffer clip.

hotkey_name.name: Hotkey name
hotkey_name.description: The OBS hotkey name to trigger.

cannot_connect.title: Cannot reach OBS Studio for {name}
cannot_connect.description:
Home Assistant failed to connect to OBS Studio for **{name}**.

Check that OBS is running and the WebSocket server is enabled, then reload the integration.

auth_failed.title: OBS WebSocket authentication failed for {name}
auth_failed.description: The WebSocket password for **{name}** was rejected. Go to **Settings → Devices & services → {name}** and reconfigure with the correct password.

ssh_failed.title: SSH tunnel failed for {name}
ssh_failed.description: The SSH tunnel for **{name}** could not be established or has dropped. Check the SSH host, key path, and network connectivity.
